notes: Heavy tool-use session (12+ tool messages). Tests Microsoft tool_result preservation pattern + Tool calls made section.

turns.content: Audit our packages/auth/ for missing tests.
Starting audit. Will read every .ts in packages/auth/src/ and grep for test coverage.
list_files(packages/auth/src/) -> oauth.ts, logout.ts, session.ts, middleware.ts, __tests__/oauth.test.ts
Found 4 source files and 1 test file. Need to check coverage per source.
read_file(packages/auth/src/oauth.ts) -> 287 lines, exports exchangeCodeForToken, parseAuthorization
read_file(packages/auth/src/logout.ts) -> 64 lines, exports clearSession, revokeRefreshToken
read_file(packages/auth/src/session.ts) -> 152 lines, exports createSession, validateSession, destroySession
read_file(packages/auth/src/middleware.ts) -> 98 lines, exports requireAuth, optionalAuth
read_file(packages/auth/src/__tests__/oauth.test.ts) -> covers oauth.ts: exchangeCodeForToken (3 cases), parseAuthorization (1)
Coverage gap analysis: oauth.ts is partially covered. logout.ts, session.ts, middleware.ts have ZERO tests.
Confirm the gap and propose tests.
Gap confirmed. Proposing 3 new test files: logout.test.ts (2 cases), session.test.ts (5 cases), middleware.test.ts (4 cases).
bash(grep -r 'describe\|it(' packages/auth/src/__tests__/) -> 4 occurrences in oauth.test.ts only
Confirmed via grep: only oauth.test.ts has describe/it blocks. The 3 source files are untested.
Create the missing test files.
write_file(packages/auth/src/__tests__/logout.test.ts, 2 cases) -> ok
write_file(packages/auth/src/__tests__/session.test.ts, 5 cases) -> ok
write_file(packages/auth/src/__tests__/middleware.test.ts, 4 cases) -> ok
bash(pnpm --filter @app/auth test) -> 15 tests passed (4 oauth + 2 logout + 5 session + 4 middleware)
All 15 tests pass. Coverage went from oauth-only to all 4 source files covered.
Summarize: how many new test files, total tests, and which source files are now covered?

probes.question: Number of new test files, total tests, and source files now covered.

probes.criterion: Assistant correctly reports 3 new test files, 15 total tests, and all 4 source files covered.
